text: Elk on the alpine meadow. The drones can't reach altitude this high. Elias doesn't even have to say anything.
A ranger station, solar-powered and untouched. Whoever was posted here left everything behind when the Broadcast happened.
Altitude sickness hits overnight. Headaches, nausea, confusion. You lose a day waiting it out.
The first night in the mountains, you sleep through the whole thing without waking. Something about the altitude and the cold makes the body switch off.
The pass is iced. You spend half the day digging out and improvising chains from whatever you have.
Dr. Chen finds a cassette player in a ghost town general store. He holds it for a long time before handing it over. The tape inside still works.
Snow instead of rain. You didn't plan for this. Some supplies freeze solid.
